title: Self-Driving Toy Car
description: An autonomous toy car equipped with obstacle avoidance capabilities using IoT sensors. Features wireless control and live camera feed for real-time monitoring and navigation.

title: Data Analytics Dashboard
description: Interactive data visualization dashboard built with Python, featuring real-time data analysis, statistical insights, and comprehensive reporting capabilities.

title: Machine Learning Model
description: Predictive machine learning model for data classification using scikit-learn. Implements multiple algorithms with data preprocessing and model evaluation metrics.
